title: Tenant-scoped PubSub subscribe and broadcast pair
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/tenant_chat_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TenantChatLive). mount/3 takes %{"org_id" => org_id, "room_id" => room_id} from session. Build the topic as "chat:org:#{org_id}:room:#{room_id}". Subscribe via connected?/1 guard. Broadcast on handle_event("send") to the same scoped topic. Render the messages as a stream. Do NOT use the unscoped topic "chat" or "chat:room:#{room_id}" — the tenant must be part of the scope.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing tenant scoping + paired subscribe/broadcast + connected?/1 + stream combo. Multi-step.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking: 'Unscoped topics leak data between tenants'
